title: WAIAB
description: This resource pack allows you to rename a carved pumpkin to almost any item or block in Minecraft, changing its model to that of the chosen item or block and wear it on your hat
body:
# WAIAB: Wear All Items and Blocks!

**Ever wanted to wear a block of Diamond Ore on your head? With WAIAB, you can without needing the item itself!**

This resource pack allows you to rename a carved pumpkin to almost any item or block in the Game, changing its model to that of the chosen item or block.

If you want to remove the Pumpkin Blur and doesnt wanna use a resourcepack to remove it entirely i recommend this datapack of mine to remove the Pumpkin Blur per Item: 
- [No Pumpkin Overlay (Recipe)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-pumpkin-overlay-recipe)




**No mods required!** This resource pack uses the new possibilities of [Item Model Definitions](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Items_model_definition). Specifically, it utilizes [Component Value dependent](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Items_model_definition#component_2) item models and textures to dynamically change the pumpkin's appearance based on its name.

**Important Note for Block Items:**

For certain block items that have distinct item forms, you'll need to append "**Item**" to the name in the anvil. For example, to wear the item model of a Turtle Egg, rename the carved pumpkin to "**Turtle Egg Item**". This distinction is necessary to differentiate between the block model ("Turtle Egg") and its corresponding item model.

**See it in Action!**

![Animated GIF showcasing the resource pack in action. Renaming a carved pumpkin to "Flowering Azalea" changes its model accordingly.](https://i.imgur.com/Tb2lU62.gif)
